narrative:
Circleville 4-B (precinct in Pickaway County) has 622 registered voters, with 64.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
